config.rationale: First run should be a baseline. I chose SGLang because the user specifically wants an MTP/NEXTN assessment, and the cleanest way to measure that is to establish a no-speculative SGLang reference first. max_model_len=65536 is the safe starting point for a 9B model on a single 80GB H100 and follows the binary-search rule; using 262144 immediately would be too aggressive before proving headroom. mem_fraction_static=0.8 and fcfs keep this close to default behavior. Expected MTP uplift for the later matched SGLang NEXTN test on this model/H100 is roughly +15% to +35% decode throughput on decode-heavy workloads, with little TTFT improvement and possible regression on short outputs/high-prefill cases due to draft overhead. For vLLM, --language-model-only on a VLM checkpoint is likely a smaller win: mostly memory savings from skipping vision components, usually translating to ~0% to +10% throughput improvement but potentially more usable KV cache / higher safe context if the vision stack would otherwise consume a few GB.

llm_commentary: This first SGLang baseline is currently the leader on all three goals simply because it is the only successful point so far: highest throughput at 4395.5 and lowest TTFT p95 at 142.4 ms, while also easily satisfying the balanced constraint of TTFT p95 < 500 ms. As a throughput baseline it is strong enough to anchor speculative/NEXTN follow-ups, but it does not yet prove local optimality because no neighboring SGLang settings or competing engines have been tested. For latency, the result is already comfortably good, though speculative methods are more likely to improve throughput than TTFT; for balanced performance, this is an excellent safe starting point rather than an endpoint.
docker_command: docker run --name bench-sglang-44b82ae8a640 --gpus all --shm-size 16g --network host -v /root/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface -d lmsysorg/sglang:latest python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --tp-size 1 --dtype auto --enable-metrics --mem-fraction-static 0.8 --context-length 65536 --reasoning-parser qwen3 --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder
